method: Each benchmark item's anchor-chunk embedding (its own precomputed Titan vector) is used as the query vector into searchCorpusWithEmbedding(topK=3). recallAt3 = fraction of questions where the expected source article appears anywhere in the top 3 results; ownChunkTop1Rate = fraction where the anchor chunk itself ranks #1 (expected to be ~1.0 by construction, since cosine(x, x) = 1 is the maximum possible score — this is a sanity floor on the ranking algorithm and corpus integrity, not a measure of live query-embedding quality).
regressionPolicy: backend/tests/eval/ragRetrieval.eval.test.ts fails the build if a measured value drops below the corresponding field here, or if the benchmark shrinks below questionCount. Regenerate this file (by hand, reviewed) whenever the benchmark grows or the corpus changes in a way that legitimately moves these numbers — never lower a threshold to make a red build green without recording why in the same PR.
